channel.title: CDATA Example Feed
channel.description: A feed where all descriptions use CDATA sections

item.title: Rich HTML Description
item.description:
Welcome to the Post

This description contains bold, italic, and links.

  • First item
  • Second item with inline code

item.title: Special Characters in CDATA
item.description: Prices: $10 < $20 & $30 > $25. Use the formula: x = (a + b) * c / d. "Quoted" and 'single quoted' text.

item.title: CDATA Title Too
item.description: This item also has CDATA in the title element above, though that is uncommon.
